title: Who will win big on Oscars Night? Predictions for all awards and some may surprise you - The Mirror US
text: The Mirror US published Oscar predictions covering all major categories including Best Film Editing for 2026. The publication's prediction experts analyzed the five nominees: F1 (Stephen Mirrione), Marty Supreme (Ronald Bronstein and Josh Safdie), One Battle After Another (Andy Jurgensen), Sentimental Value (Olivier Bugge Coutté), and Sinners (Michael P. Shawver). The Mirror's analysis considered betting odds from major prediction markets, recent awards wins, and industry expert consensus. One Battle After Another was identified as the likely winner based on its strong performance in precursor ceremonies and expert predictions. The article provided context about each film's editing style and how that might resonate with Academy voters who typically favor editing that serves the story without drawing attention to itself.
